title: Magikarp Hunger Bars
description: Changes the hunger bars to Magikarp from Pokémon!
body:
# Magikarp Hunger Bars!

Changes the hunger bars in Minecraft to **Magikarp**! Inspired by the best game in the world, **Magikarp Jump**.

## **Appleskin** and **Cobblemon** compatible!

Appleskin saturation hunger bars turn into Shiny Magikarp! The Appleskin background image is blue for contrast.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/H3x3-22Gi3g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
